titleStmt.title: SII 38.550: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 550. (A.R. No. 550 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Nīrvaṇṇar perumāḷ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravartti Rājarājadēva (Rājarāja III) Year 14, Rishabha, Attam, śu. di. 10. Wednesday = 22nd May 1230 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of 1(3/4) paḻaṅkāśu by Paṭṭāladēvaṉ Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ (a native) of Peruṅganalvaṭṭam in order to burn a twilight lamp to the god at Tirunīrmalai. The temple priest Naimisai Kṛishṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ received the gift and agreed to maintain this twilight lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hari Om svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarāca tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvapa
kṣattu tecamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattināḷ tirunirmalai Emperumāṉukkup peruṅ
kaṉalvaṭṭam pākkiḻān paṭṭāla tevaṉ paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ vaitta canti viḷakku 1 canti viḷakko
ṉṟukku Ik koyilk kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril nayimicai śrīkraṣṇapaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻa
ṅkācu 1mukkāl Ippaḻaṅkācu Oṉṟe mukkāluṅ koṇṭu Ittiruviḷakku cantirāti
ttavarai celuttakkaṭaven śrīkraṣṇapaṭṭaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.550 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
